calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Off Calendar

Motion To Request Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Mar-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
James Driscoll, Esq. special appearance for plaintiff Granite State Insurance Company.
Witness was waived in open court.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant bErnesto Gonzalez ind. and dba AAA Cleaning as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,814.00
Prejudgment Interest - $10,375.45
Attorney's Fees - $500.00
Costs - $475.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $42,164.45

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
